description: Direct pricing communication for special occasion dining offers, presenting per-person cost alongside reservation details and location to drive bookings.
structural_recipe: Lead with occasion greeting (e.g., Ramadan blessing), state restaurant name, include high-quality food imagery, clearly display per-person pricing in SAR, add location pin with area name, end with direct reservation phone number. Structure: Greeting → Restaurant Name → Location → Price Point → Contact Info.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value transparency and convenience during high-occasion dining periods. Explicit pricing removes purchase friction, per-person breakdown aligns with Saudi group dining culture, and direct phone contact respects preference for personal confirmation over digital booking.
transplantation_caveats: Pricing must be in SAR and culturally appropriate for stated occasion
Ramadan pricing sensitivity - ensure value proposition justifies premium pricing during fasting month
Phone-based reservation preference may limit scalability vs. booking platform integration
Location specificity (neighborhood names) critical for Saudi metro areas
cultural_constraints: Pricing transparency expected but must avoid appearing exploitative during religious occasions
Group dining context means pricing should emphasize value-for-group over individual luxury positioning
